name: Memorise Ephesians 1:3
memory_verse_text_en: Praise be to the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, who has blessed us in the heavenly realms with every spiritual blessing in Christ.
memory_verse_text_zh: 愿颂赞归与我们主耶稣基督的父神！他在基督里曾赐给我们天上各样属灵的福气。

name: Study Ephesians 1:1-14
scripture_text_en: Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus by the will of God, To God's holy people in Ephesus, the faithful in Christ Jesus: Grace and peace to you from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.
scripture_text_zh: 奉神旨意，作基督耶稣使徒的保罗，写信给在以弗所的圣徒，就是在基督耶稣里有忠心的人。愿恩惠、平安从我们的父神和主耶稣基督归与你们！
explanation_en: This opening section introduces Paul's letter to the Ephesians. Paul begins with an extraordinary hymn of praise, celebrating the spiritual blessings God has lavished on believers in Christ.
explanation_zh: 这段开篇介绍了保罗写给以弗所教会的书信。保罗以一首非凡的赞美诗开始，颂赞神在基督里赐给信徒丰富的属灵福气。

name: Memorise Ephesians 1:4-5
memory_verse_text_en: For he chose us in him before the creation of the world to be holy and blameless in his sight. In love he predestined us for adoption to sonship through Jesus Christ.
memory_verse_text_zh: 就如神从创立世界以前，在基督里拣选了我们，使我们在他面前成为圣洁，无有瑕疵；又因爱我们，就按着自己意旨所喜悦的，预定我们借着耶稣基督得儿子的名分。

name: Study Ephesians 1:1-14
scripture_text_en: Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus by the will of God, To God's holy people in Ephesus, the faithful in Christ Jesus: Grace and peace to you from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.
scripture_text_zh: 奉神旨意，作基督耶稣使徒的保罗，写信给在以弗所的圣徒，就是在基督耶稣里有忠心的人。愿恩惠、平安从我们的父神和主耶稣基督归与你们！
explanation_en: In this continued study of Ephesians 1:1-14, we explore the themes of election, predestination, and redemption through Christ's blood.
explanation_zh: 在继续学习以弗所书1:1-14中，我们探讨了拣选、预定和借着基督的血得蒙救赎的主题。
